data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for extensible metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'extensible metadata for future ranking/prioritization', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to this metadata or its functionality, leading to an inconclusive result. The evidence primarily covers other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing the specific requirement for extensible metadata.
gaps: Extensible metadata for future ranking/prioritization is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
